modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be distracting grammar usage and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Mac print queue shows "Hold for Authentication" error.

full_description_text:  
I was trying to print something from my Mac, but the print queue just says "Hold for Authentication." It's super frustrating because I can't get my documents out. I don't know why this is happening, but it seems like a glitch with the PaperCut setup.
short_description: Mac print queue shows "Hold for Authentication" error.
description: I was trying to print something from my Mac, but the print queue just says "Hold for Authentication." It's super frustrating because I can't get my documents out. I don't know why this is happening, but it seems like a glitch with the PaperCut setup.
